project-context.md.description: Static project overview maintained manually. Describes tech stack, directory structure, key modules, established patterns, and testing conventions. Fed to planners and clarifiers as grounding context. Updated when project architecture changes.

requirements-understanding.md.description: Confirmed requirements understanding produced by the HL Clarifier and approved by the user via HITL gate before planning begins

context.md.description: Context generated by context-gatherer after user approves the high-level plan direction

high-level-plan.md.description: Finalized high-level plan, copied here after HL Reviewer approval
High-level plan #1 generated by high-level planner

high-level-revisions.md.description: Revisions for high-level plan #1 generated by high-level reviewer, added only if revisions are necessary

high-level-plan.md.description: High-level plan #2 generated by high-level planner given the revisions for high-level plan #1

low-level-plan.md.description: Low-level plan #1 generated by low-level planner

low-level-revisions.md.description: Revisions for low-level plan #1 generated by low-level reviewer, added only if revisions are necessary

low-level-plan.md.description: Low-level plan #2 generated by low-level planner given the revisions for low-level plan #1

log.md.description: Log for implementation-0001 generated by the implementer after implementing the high/low-level plans into the codebase, using the tests generated for the initiative by the test writer

revisions.md.description: Review of implementation-0001 generated by the implement-reviewer, added only if revisions are necessary

log.md.description: Log for implementation-0002 generated by the implementer after implementing revisions from previous implementation's review

fix-plan.md.description: Contains the fix-plan used in the specific fix-attempt, only added here in the specific attempt directory given a failed attempt and the specific issue's fix-plan needing to be revised

revisions.md.description: Revisions for the fix-attempt's implementation generated by the fix-reviewer, only added if revisions required

issue.{spec,test,cy}.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}.description: Contains test used in the specific fix-attempt, only added here in the specific attempt directory given a failed attempt and the specific issue's test needing to be rewritten

fix-plan.md.description: Contains the fix-plan for this specific issue, can be revised if necessary given a failed fix attempt

issue.{spec,test,cy}.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}.description: Contains test for the specific issue, generated by the test writer once the issue's context is generated by the context-gatherer. The test is reviewed by the user before continuing. Can be revised if necessary given a failed fix attempt

context.md.description: Contains context for the specific issue, generated by the issue-context-gatherer using the issue description and confirmed issue understanding

issue.md.description: Contains the basic recreation sequence/description of a single issue, only written to by the user

issue-understanding.md.description: Confirmed issue understanding produced by the Fix Clarifier and approved by the user via HITL gate before context gathering begins

all-issues.md.description: A list of all issues discovered for an initiative, only written to by the user

<initiative-title>.{spec,test,cy}.{js,js.description: Finalized tests for the initiative generated by the test writer, after high/low-level plans have been finalized or based on the test reviewer revisions
Tests for the initiative generated by the test writer, after high/low-level plans have been finalized

revisions.md.description: Revisions for the initiative's tests generated by the test reviewer, added only if revisions are necessary

<initiative-title>.{spec,test,cy}.{js,js.description: Tests for the initiative generated by the test writer based on the test reviewer's revisions of the previous test #

final-report.md.description: Report generated once the initiative is deemed complete
